codeReview.summary: Fix commit 9770617 addresses both prior blocking failures. Review Board now explicitly marks the exclusion-count query as the one permitted unfiltered exception while preserving validation filters for all analytical query templates. Red Team Mode 1 now assigns review-bead creation and `blocks` dependency creation to Red Team directly. Idea Factory settings now include `$HOME/gopath/bin` in all PATH hook exports.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture invariants still state that Review Board always filters queries, which now conflicts with the accepted one-query exception for exclusion counting.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:79 says "Review Board ALWAYS filters on manipulation_check='passed' AND results_valid=true"; updated role file documents a permitted exception at research/roles/review-board/CLAUDE.md:16,44,121,126.

sharedStateObservations.observation: integration-worker skill language still implies unconditional filter enforcement and does not mention the approved exclusion-count exception, so future role edits may reintroduce this mismatch.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md:46 and example assertions at lines 88-99 emphasize validation filters in all templates; updated role guidance now allows one explicit unfiltered query at research/roles/review-board/CLAUDE.md:16,44,121,126.

summary: PASS. The fix resolves the prior review-board-role and red-team-role blocking defects and applies the PATH correction for idea-factory settings. No code-level blockers remain for this feature.
